title: Question: support for localparam in parameter port list
body:
---


Author Name: **Nobuo Ito**
Original Redmine Message: 1820 from https://www.veripool.org



---

Hello,

I study SystemVerilog.
Does Verilator allow _localparam_ in parameter port list such as following?

```
`timescale 1ns / 1ns 
module ram #(parameter           AWIDTH=10,
              localparam DEPTH=1<<AWIDTH,　//localparam is here
              parameter  DWIDTH=8)
 (inout [DWIDTH-1:0] data,
  input [AWIDTH-1:0] addr,
  input              r_wn, cs_n);
  logic [DWIDTH-1:0] mem [DEPTH];
  assign data = (!cs_n && r_wn) ? mem[addr] : 'z;
  always_latch
     if (!cs_n && !r_wn) mem[addr] <= data;
endmodule

```
